headline: Is General Dynamics Corporation (GD) One of the Best Large Cap Defense Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds?
summary: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) is among the 10 Best Large Cap Defense Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On April 30, Morgan Stanley analyst Kristine Liwag lifted the price target on the stock to $435 from $410 and reiterated an Overweight rating. The adjustment came after the company reported results for the first quarter […]
